title: Day 5 Lesson 4 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - けさ なんじ に おきましたか。 (Kesa nanji ni okimashitaka?) = What time did you wake up today?

Sentence 2 - ろくじ に おきました。(Rokuji ni okimashita) = I woke up at 6.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
